Prettier Everyday Team Editorial Policy Contact Us Home » HAIR CARE » HAIR STYLES 15 Stunning Butterfly Haircuts for Short, Medium and Long Hair Written by Dr. Usama Hassan Last Updated on March 20, 2025 Image: istock.com Hey, ladies with long and short, oh also with medium hair, are you searching for a good butterfly hairstyle that matches your personality, aesthetic preferences and looks, you have clicked the right article. We all know that a perfect party dress or a fancy makeup is nothing without a beautiful hairstyle that exactly gives your face a shape you like. Expensive dinner dresses or party wears make a good combo with newly trending butterfly haircuts which are specially famous for their voluminous giving nature, can accentuate any face features or is easy to maintain and best suited for casual or occasional events. Articles Contains What is Butterfly Haircut? Wrinkles Short Butterfly Haircuts Medium Butterfly Haircuts Long Butterfly Haircuts Summary Key Takeaways Frequently Asked Questions What Is Butterfly Haircut? Image: istock.com A butterfly haircut is a hairstyle that combines short, face-framing pieces in the front and long layers in the back to create a soft, voluminous effect. Short Butterfly Haircuts ( between chin-length and collarbone-length) 1. Blonde Bombshell Image: istock.com Start by selecting a short hairstyle that adds volume and movement. Look for options like a textured pixie cut or a voluminous bob. Soft waves can also enhance the bombshell look by creating fullness, which is key to achieving that glamorous aesthetic. To enhance your bombshell look, consider coloring your hair blonde—either a striking platinum or a warm honey blonde. It’s best to consult with a professional colorist to find the shade that best suits your skin tone. Remember, especially if you’re going lighter, maintaining the health of your hair is crucial. Quick Tip: Blow-Drying: Use a round brush while blow-drying to lift your hair at the roots and add volume, giving your hair that full-bodied look. Curling: After blow-drying, apply a lightweight mousse or styling cream for texture. Then, use a curling iron to create soft waves by curling the hair away from your face, lending a more natural and effortless appearance. Once you’ve curled your hair, gently tousle the waves with your fingers to create a more relaxed look. Lastly, apply a shiny serum to achieve that polished, glamorous finish. Keep In Mind: To keep your hairstyle looking its best, schedule regular trims to preserve the shape and health of your haircut. Additionally, use shampoos and conditioners designed to protect your color, which will help maintain the vibrancy of your blonde hair. Celebrity Influence: Actress and singer Dove Cameron surprised herself by returning to blonde hair, a look she now associates with her journey towards self-acceptance and authenticity. She credits this transformation to her personal growth and her relationship with musician Damiano David of Måneskin. 2. Textured Butterfly Bob Image: istock.com Start by cutting shorter layers around the face, beginning at the chin. This creates a flattering frame for your features. Gradually blend these shorter layers into longer ones toward the back of your hair. This technique helps you maintain overall length while adding volume. Use texturizing shears or a razor to add movement to the hair and reduce bulkiness. This step enhances the light, feathery effect of the layers and makes the hair appear more dynamic. Quick Tip: For styling, first apply a volumizing mousse to damp hair. Then, blow-dry your hair using a round brush. Focus on lifting the roots while curling the ends outward with the brush. This technique not only helps to shape the layers but also promotes a soft, butterfly-like look in the final style. Celebrity Influence: Celebrities like Zendaya and Jenna Ortega have embraced the butterfly bob, contributing to its rising popularity. 3. Pixie Butterfly Hybrid Image: istock.com Start by isolating a triangular section at the front to determine the length of your face-framing layers. Cut these layers shorter to enhance the face shape, ensuring they blend seamlessly with the longer sections at the back. To achieve a butterfly effect, use vertical sections beginning from the face-framing layers and moving backward. Before cutting, over direct each section forward, which helps to preserve length while adding volume. For the back of the hair, utilize a 45-degree elevation technique with gentle tension to create flowing layers without losing length. This approach promotes natural movement and avoids any choppy looks. Celebrity Influence: Rihanna has explored different pixie cuts, including styles with layered elements that evoke a butterfly design. 4. Butterfly Bob (Long Bob) Image: istock.com Begin by trimming shorter layers around the face that usually reach the chin or jawline. Next, incorporate longer layers that flow from the chin down to the nape of the neck, blending them seamlessly for a smooth, streaming look. To accomplish a light, feathery “butterfly wing” effect, employ razors or texturizing shears to refine the ends. Quick Tip: For styling , use a blow dryer paired with a round brush to elevate the roots and softly curl the ends outward, enhancing volume and movement in the hair. Celebrity Influence: Hailey Bieber’s recent hairstyle, inspired by ’90s supermodel Cindy Crawford, features an updo with face-framing tendrils. 5. Short Butterfly Cut With Curtain Bangs Image: istock.com To achieve a well-structured haircut, start by dividing the hair into sections: top, middle, and bottom. Use clips or ties to keep each part separate, which makes cutting easier and ensures an even style. For layers, begin with the top section to create shorter layers that frame the face. In the middle section, maintain overall length while adding some layering for volume; a light trim helps promote movement. In the bottom section, keep longer layers for fullness and balance.If you want curtain bangs, cut the front sections to a length suitable for a middle part, allowing them to be swept to the sides. Quick Tip: When styling, techniques vary by hair type. For straight hair, use a blow dryer and round brush to add volume and curl the ends. For wavy or curly hair, apply a curl-enhancing product and use a diffuser to dry while preserving texture. Celebrity Influence: Hailee Steinfeld , known for her roles in film and music, often sports layered hairstyles with curtain bangs that embody the butterfly cut, featuring textured layers for added volume and movement. Medium Butterfly Haircuts (shoulder to chest length) 1. Layered Shoulder-Length Butterfly Cut Image: istock.com To create a chic haircut, start by partitioning the hair into three sections: top, middle, and bottom. Use clips to secure each section; this simplifies the cutting process and promotes an even finish. Begin with the top section, cutting shorter layers that highlight the face. In the middle section, preserve the length while adding light layering to boost volume and movement. For the bottom section, maintain longer layers to ensure fullness and harmony. For curtain bangs, trim the front sections to a length that suits a center part, allowing them to be swept aside effortlessly. Quick Tip: Styling techniques should cater to your hair type. For straight hair, use a round brush and blow dryer to achieve volume and curl at the ends. For wavy or curly hair, apply a curl-enhancing product and dry with a diffuser to keep the natural texture. Celebrity Influence: Kerry Washington has adopted the butterfly haircut, using a deep side part for a touch of old Hollywood glamour. 2. Butterfly Cut With Wispy Bangs Image: istock.com Start by dividing your hair into three main sections: top, middle, and bottom. Use ponytails to secure each section, which will help keep things organized while you cut. Release the top section and trim shorter layers around your face for a delicate, wispy look. Blend the middle section layers into the top section, ensuring you keep the overall length while adding some volume. Trim the bottom section to maintain length and fullness without sacrificing the shape. Cut the front sections to your preferred length to create wispy bangs, allowing you to style them with a soft, textured finish. To get that feathery look, try techniques like twisting and point cutting. Quick Tip: For Straight Hair: Start with a volumizing mousse, then blow-dry your hair using a round brush to lift the roots and curl the ends outwards. For Wavy or Curly Hair: Apply a curl-enhancing product and use a diffuser to keep your natural texture intact while highlighting those lovely layers. Celebrity Influence: Elizabeth Olsen debuted a hairstyle with long, tousled waves that transition from dark brown roots to warm-toned caramel ends, paired with wispy French bangs and a center part, reminiscent of 1960s and ’70s beauty trends. 3. Wavy Butterfly Cut With Soft Layers Image: istock.com Start with clean, damp hair by washing and lightly towel-drying it. If you plan to use heat styling tools, apply a heat protectant to shield your hair. Comb through to remove tangles, sectioning your hair into manageable parts. To create layers, use the ponytail method: gather the top section into a high ponytail and cut it to your desired length for the shortest layer. Release the ponytail and blend it with the rest of your hair. For face-framing layers, section off the front pieces and elevate them, cutting at a slight diagonal for a soft look. Quick Tip: After cutting, apply a curl-enhancing mousse or cream to your damp hair and use a diffuser attachment on your blow dryer to encourage natural waves. Once dry, finish with a light-hold hairspray to maintain volume and texture. Celebrity Influence: Billie Eilish, the singer has embraced the butterfly haircut, featuring soft, shaggy layers that add volume and body to her blonde bob. 4. Butterfly Cut With Face-Framing Layers Image: istock.com To style the hair, divide it into three sections: the Front Section from the temples forward, the Crown Section from the crown to the temples, and the Back Section from the nape to the crown. Within the front section, create a triangular subsection starting from the center of the forehead to the temples. Overregulate these sections forward and trim to the desired length, ensuring a gradual lengthening towards the back. For the crown section, lift the hair at a 45-degree angle and trim, using the front layers as a guide. In the back section, maintain length by cutting with minimal elevation, ensuring the layers cascade smoothly over one another. Celebrity Influence: Sabrina Carpenter has adopted the butterfly haircut, which has shorter layers around her face and longer layers on the sides, creating a butterfly wing look. 5. Butterfly Shag Cut Image: istock.com Start by dividing the hair into three main sections: the top, middle, and bottom. The middle section should be the longest. This division helps in managing the length and shape of the haircut effectively. Cut the top layer shorter to create volume at the crown of the head. Leave the middle layers longer to create “wings” that frame the face. Keep the bottom layers longest to ensure a balanced look, providing support to the overall hairstyle. Use techniques like point cutting or thinning shears to texturize the hair. This creates a messy, lived-in feel that adds dimension and movement. If you choose to add bangs, consider soft bangs or curtain bangs that blend seamlessly into the rest of the hairstyle. This gives a lighter, feathery effect around the forehead. Quick Tip: Apply a light styling product, such as a texturizing spray or mousse, to enhance movement and volume, giving the hair a beautifully styled finish. For a messy, voluminous look, blow-dry the hair or apply sea salt spray. If you want defined curls or waves, use a curling iron or flat iron to create soft waves, enhancing the style further. Celebrity Influence: Jennifer Lopez has long, flowing hair with curtain bangs and layers that create a butterfly shag look. Long Butterfly Haircuts (below chest length) 1. Classic Long Butterfly Cut Image: istock.com Start with clean, dry hair, divided into top, middle, and bottom sections for precision. The top section will be the shortest, while the bottom maintains the longest length. Cut the longest layers at the bottom to preserve length and softness, and layer the middle section slightly shorter to add dimension. In the top section, cut shorter, face-framing layers at an angle to create the butterfly “wings.” These layers should blend seamlessly with longer lengths for a soft, wispy appearance. Use texturizing scissors or razor techniques to add movement and ensure the ends feel light and airy, mimicking butterfly wings. Face-framing layers should fall just below the chin, emphasizing the cheekbones and jawline with natural movement. Smooth transitions between layers are crucial for a soft, flowing cut without harsh lines. Finish with a light dusting of layering spray or a styling cream to enhance movement and volume without weighing the hair down. This cut complements various textures; a round brush blow-dry adds volume for straight hair, while air-drying enhances waves or curls. Soft waves can further accentuate the layers, adding glam to the look. Celebrity Influence: Shania Twain , a celebrated figure in the country music world, has elegantly adopted the butterfly haircut, proudly presenting it at a number of events and highlighting its enduring charm. 2. Voluminous Butterfly Layers Image: istock.com Start with clean, dry hair divided into top, middle, and bottom sections. The top will be the shortest, while the bottom maintains its length. The stylist layers the middle section slightly shorter to add dimension. For the top section, create shorter, angled face-framing layers that form the butterfly “wings,” seamlessly blending with the longer lengths for a soft, airy effect. Texturing techniques keep the ends light and full of movement. Face-framing layers should fall just below the chin, enhancing the cheekbones and jawline with a gentle flow. Ensure smooth transitions between layers for a soft, flowing style without any harsh lines. To finish, apply a mist of layering spray or a light styling cream to amplify volume and movement. This adaptable cut works well with various hair textures—use a round brush for straight styles or let waves air-dry naturally. Adding soft curls can further showcase the layers for a touch of glamour. Celebrity Influence: Matilda Djerf, the Swedish influencer and designer is known for her voluminous butterfly layers, inspiring many of her followers. 3. Butterfly Cut With Long Bangs Image: istock.com Begin with clean, dry hair divided into top, middle, and bottom sections; the top is cut shortest, while the bottom maintains length. The middle section is layered slightly shorter for dimension. Create shorter, angled face-framing layers in the top section to form the butterfly “wings,” blending smoothly with longer lengths for a light, airy look. Texturing techniques ensure the ends have movement.Face-framing layers should fall just below the chin, accentuating the cheekbones and jawline. Smooth transitions between layers create a soft, flowing style without harsh lines. Finish with a light texturing spray or styling cream for added volume and movement. This cut suits various textures—round brush for straight hair or air-dry for waves. Soft curls can further enhance the layers, adding a glamorous touch. Celebrity Influence : Selena Gomez , an actress, has adopted the butterfly bob hairstyle. This style features long layers and curtain bangs that frame the face, resembling the fluttering of butterfly wings. 4. Hollywood Glam Butterfly Cut Image: istock.com Start with clean, dry hair divided into top, middle, and bottom sections. The top is cut shortest, while the bottom keeps its length. The middle section is layered slightly shorter for added dimension.Create angled face-framing layers in the top section to form the butterfly “wings,” blending with the longer hair for a light look. Prettier Everyday Team Editorial Policy Contact Us Home » HEALTH & WELLNESS » FITNESS 8 Best Hack Squat Machine Exercises for Stronger Quads and Glutes Written by Dr. Rani Aimen Last Updated on March 19, 2025 Image: forte-fitness.co.uk Hack squats are an excellent way to build strength in the quadriceps and glutes. [ 1 ] Using a hack squat machine allows for controlled movement, making it easier to focus on proper form while targeting these key muscle groups with different squat variations. Articles Contains What is Hack Squat Machine? Origin of Squart Machine 8 Best Hack Squat Machine Exercises Incorporating Hack Squats to Daily Routine Precautions While Performing Squat Exercises Key Takeaways References What Is Hack Squat Machine? The hack squat machine is specially designed to strengthen the quadriceps, glutes and hamstrings while offering solid back support. It features a sled with padded shoulders rest and a foot platform, enabling users to perform squats with stability and controlled movement [ 2 ]. Origin of Squat Machine The hack squat exercise is named after Russian Lion, George Hackenschmidt, [ 3 ] a great wrestler of early 20 th century. He designed these exercises to build the lower body strength and reduce strain on lower back. In the 1950s, the fitness legend Jack LaLanne created a unique sliding weight apparatus [ 4 ] in his gym to improve strength training. This innovation caught the eye of Rudy Smith, who along with Engineer Paul Martin helped refine the design. The upgraded version was later introduced at Vic Tanny’s gym in Los Angeles. By the late 1950s, the machine had gained traction and was widely produced and distributed. The smith machine, as it became known, comprised of a barbell fixed on steels rails, allowing for guided vertical movement while incorporating safety mechanisms. Over time various other squat machines have been developed to accommodate different training styles and needs, offering more versatility and support for weight lifting exercise. 8 Best Hack Squat Machine Exercises Here, you’ll find 8 best Hack Squat machine exercises for strengthening your quads and glutes below: 1. Wide-Stance Hack Squat In the wide stance hack squat, you have to position your feet on the platform wider than shoulder-width apart, [ 5 ] with your toes a bit directed outward. This stance exerts more focus on the inner thighs and glutes, promoting balanced lower body development. How to perform: To carry out this squat, stand on the hack squat machine with your shoulders under the pads and feet in the wide stance. Keep your back flat against the backrest and core engaged, lower your body by bending your knees, ensuring they track over your toes. Now lower yourself until your thighs are parallel to the platform or moderately below, then push through your heels to restore your starting position. Benefit: This exercise primarily recovers your glutes and can enhance hip flexibility. Due to wider stance during exercise, it exerts more focus on the development of quads sweep and leg strength. Image: www.dhzfitness.com/ 2. Narrow Stance Hack Squat As the name indicates, narrow stance hack squat [ 6 ] involves positioning your feet on the platform closed together, about hip-width apart. This squat exercise improves the activation of hip abductors and quadriceps. How to perform: Begin by positioning yourself on the hack squat machine with your shoulders under the pads, and feet in the narrow stance. Maintain a flat back against the backrest and engage your core muscles. Lower your body by bending your knees, keep them aligned with your toes and prevent them from bending inward. Now lower yourself until your thighs reach parallel to the platform, then press through your heels to restore your original position. Benefits: Narrow stance hack squat is good for improving knee stability and building quadriceps. There is minimal involvement of glutes and hips in this exercise; thus, this squat specifically allows building of quadriceps both in size and number. Image: www.pinterest.com/ 3. Reverse Hack Squat This powerful squat exercise switches focus from quadriceps to posterior chain, and targets glutes and hamstrings [ 7 ]. This exercise changes the muscles engagement as the lifter is facing the squat machine unlike other traditional squats. How to perform: The exercise starts when the lifter positions himself on the squat machine while facing the back pad, and placing his shoulders under the shoulder rest. The feet should be shoulder-width apart on the platform and toes should be slightly directed upward. This position maintains an upright posture to begin. As the lifter lowers himself into the squat, his knees bent while his hips push backward. While doing so, ensure that knees should align with toes and should not be exceedingly forward. As the thighs reach parallel to the platform, the lifter drives through his heels to return to the starting position. Benefit: The forward-facing stance of this squat exercise brings more load on the hamstrings and glutes, causing the strengthening of these muscles. Moreover, the reverse posture of lifter reduces the load on the spine and gives support to the upper body. Image: www.inspireusafoundation.org/ 4. Hack Squat with Calf Raise Hack squat with raise calf is advanced variation of traditional hack squat aiming the quadriceps, glutes and additionally calves. It involves raising calf at the top of the squat movement, thus, it is a great choice for improving overall lower body functionality [ 8 ]. How to perform: To perform this exercise, stand on the squat machine with your feet at shoulder-width apart and shoulders under the shoulder pads. Now gradually lower your body into a squat by bending your knees and hips until your thighs are parallel to the ground. As you reach the starting position, gently rise onto your toes to execute a calf raise. Once your complete the squat, lower your heels before continuing to next squat and maintain a controlled posture throughout. Benefit: Multiple muscle groups are engaged during this exercise at a time, it improves muscular endurance and lower body strength. The variation of calf raise at the top of squat brings the benefit of activation and enhancing growth of glutes, quads and calves. Image: liftmanual.com/hack-calf-raise/ 5. Smith Machine Hack Squat This squat is done on Smith machine [ 9 ] which provides a guided bar path; thus, minimizing the risk of losing balance and builds lower body strength. How to perform: Start this exercise by positioning your body under the bar with your feet at shoulder-width apart and minimally forward of your body. Recline the bar on your upper back, get your core involved and keep your chest upright. Now gradually lower your body into a squat by bending your knees and hips until your thighs are parallel to the ground. Then drive through your heels and come back to the original position. Take the precaution of controlled movement in order to avoid strain on your joints. Benefit: The advantage of guided movement assists you to build your leg muscles without concerning about balance. The upright posture of Smith machine drifts the focus on the movement of quads, thus ensuring strengthening of lifter’s quads. Image: flexfitnessapp.com 6. Single-Leg Hack Squat Single hack squat exercise is difficult yet productive exercise to build stronger quads, and glutes, while improving the balancing ability of a person [ 10 ]. This squat exerts greater pressure on single leg, thereby repairs the muscular imbalance. How to perform: Start the movement by placing one leg on the platform and the other leg slightly bent. Now gradually lower your body by bending knee of the working leg. Take control of your stability while lowering down until thighs reach parallel to the ground. Engage your glutes and quadriceps, and once you get to the lowest position, push back up through your heel to restore the original point. Benefit: This exercise is beneficial to progress the unilateral strength as single leg is independently under work at a time. Single leg hack squat improves the stability and balance while also building stronger glutes and quads. Image: www.jefit.com/ 7. Sissy Hack Squat Sissy hack squat focuses on the quadriceps and also engage the stability and core muscles. This exercise exerts stress on the knee extension, thus helps in building strong quads [ 11 ]. How to perform: In order to do this exercise, position yourself on the squat machine with your feet shoulder-width apart and back against the rest pad. As you go lower, allow your knees to move forward while maintaining your upper body leaned back. This controlled motion brings load on the quadriceps, thus increasing the muscle involvement. To return to the original position, push through your toes, and make sure to complete full range of movement for maximum effect. Benefit: As this exercise isolates the quadriceps, making it ideal to build the front of thighs and more defined quads. Moreover, as it demands greater balance, it improves control of the lower body. Image: x.com 8. Band-Resisted Hack Squat The purpose of adding bands to the squat machine is to increase the resistance while lifter is ascending in order to improve the muscle involvement during the exercise. How to perform: Start the exercise by attaching the resistance bands to the squat machine’s base and securing them to the shoulder pad or weight carriage. First, position yourself on the platform with your feet at shoulder-width apart. Place your shoulders under the pads, and your back strongly pressed against the back support. Now lower yourself by bending your knees and hips, until your thighs reach parallel to the platform. The resistance of bands varies throughout the movement, it is minimal when your body is lower, but it increases as push through your heels to rise up; thus, making the exercise more challenging and productive. Benefit: The involvement of bands provide continuous tension during the entire exercise, thus improves the muscles engagement and builds stronger quadriceps [ 12 ]. The variation in tension during the complete range of motion improves the gain in quads strength as these muscles are engaged more effectively. Image: www.myworkouts.io/ Incorporating Hack Squats to Daily Routine Adding hack squats to your daily routine can be a great way to build lower body strength. Following guidelines can help you to incorporate these exercises to your daily routine: Complete hack squats 1-2 times per week, make sure to take enough rest between sessions to let muscles recover. To make it easier to perform the squat, set a target for 3-4 sets of 8-12 repetitions, using a weight that challenges you while maintaining good form. There are two options to keep pushing your muscles over time, cautiously increase either the resistance or the number of repetitions to build strength gradually. Another strategy which can be additionally opted is to pair hack squats with the other lower body exercises like traditional squats and lunges for overall muscle balance and strength [ 13 ]. Precautions while Performing Squat Exercises In order to avoid injuries or joint issues during squat exercises, it is advisable to follow precautions [14] to obtain maximum benefits. Start your exercise with a warm up to prepare your muscles and joints. Do not start directly with heavier load, initiate with a lighter weight. Remember to inhale while you lower yourself and exhale when you push the weight up. Do not set your feet too low on the platform to cause knee strain. In addition, keep your back firmly pressed against the pad to support your spine and avoid it to cause strain. Key Takeaways The hack squat machine offers a great option for strengthening your glutes and quads. Learn these different hack squat machine exercises and work on improving the strength and stability of your lower body. For getting the best results with hack squat machine exercises, remember to stay consistent and maintain proper form. Prettier Everyday Team Editorial Policy Contact Us Home » BODY ART » TATTOOS Top 20 Unique Name Tattoo Ideas to Celebrate Your Loved Ones Written by Dr. Zarnish Tauheed Last Updated on March 8, 2025 Image: chronicinktattoo.com Have you ever thought about getting a tattoo that holds deep meaning? A name tattoo is one of the most personal ways to honor someone special in your life. A name tattoo is a permanent homage to your relationship, which could be with your spouse, kid, parent, or closest friend. But with so many designs, how do you choose one that stands out? Some people prefer simple and elegant name tattoos, while others like to incorporate symbols, artistic elements, or bold designs. The best part is that a name tattoo can be as unique as your relationship with the person. In this article, we’ll explore 20 unique name tattoo ideas that will help you express love creatively and meaningfully. From elegant scripts to artistic symbols, there’s something for everyone. Articles Contains Creative and Meaningful Name Tattoo Ideas You’ll Love Final Thoughts Key Takeaways Frequently Asked Questions Creative and Meaningful Name Tattoo Ideas You’ll Love 1. Classic Cursive Name Tattoo Image: kreafolk.com A timeless choice, cursive name tattoos add a touch of elegance. Whether small and straightforward or large and bold, cursive fonts flow beautifully on the skin, making the name look graceful and stylish. This design works well on the wrist, forearm, or collarbone. Add flourishes or extra loops in the lettering to make it more decorative. 2. Infinity Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com The infinity symbol represents eternity, making it perfect for a name tattoo. You can intertwine the name into the design or place it along the loops of the symbol to show never-ending love. This tattoo is popular among couples and parents who want to express everlasting affection. 3. Heartbeat Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com A heartbeat line, also called an EKG line, with a name in between, symbolizes that the person is your lifeline. This design is popular among parents, couples, and close friends who want to show deep emotional connection. You can add a small heart at the end to enhance the design. 4. Feather with Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com A feather represents freedom, strength, and spirituality. Adding a name along the curve of the feather makes the tattoo both artistic and meaningful. Feathers can be designed in various styles, from realistic to watercolor, and placed on the wrist, shoulder, or ribcage. 5. Roman Numerals with Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com Instead of just getting a name, why not add a date in Roman numerals? This could be a birthday, anniversary, or any significant date tied to the person. It adds a touch of uniqueness to your tattoo and is a great way to commemorate a crucial moment. 6. Puzzle Piece Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com A puzzle piece tattoo with a name inside represents someone who completes you. This idea is perfect for couples, siblings, or best friends who feel incomplete without each other. You can even get matching puzzle piece tattoos with a loved one to show how you fit together. 7. Crown Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com Want to treat your loved one like royalty? A name tattoo with a crown symbolizes importance and admiration. You can add a small crown on top of the name or place it at the end of the design. Some people add gemstones or decorative elements to make the tattoo look more luxurious. 8. Butterfly Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com A butterfly represents transformation and beauty. Adding a name to a butterfly design creates a soft, feminine tattoo that celebrates growth and love. This works well on the shoulder, ankle, or wrist. You can also choose to have the name written along the wings or incorporated into the butterfly’s body. 9. Angel Wings Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com If you want to honor a loved one who has passed away, angel wings with a name create a touching memorial tattoo. You can add a halo or date to make it even more special. Some people choose to have one wing on each side of the name, while others prefer a single wing with the name written along its curve. 10. Watercolor Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com Adding a watercolor effect behind the name creates a stunning look for those who love artistic tattoos. The splash of colors makes the design stand out and adds a creative touch to the name. This style works well with cursive fonts or abstract lettering. 11. Lock and Key Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com This design symbolizes that your loved one holds the key to your heart. One person can get the lock while the other gets the key, or you can have both elements in one tattoo with a name written inside. This is a popular choice for couples who want a meaningful matching tattoo. 12. Tree of Life Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com The Tree of Life represents strength, growth, and deep connections. Adding names to its branches or roots makes it a meaningful tattoo, especially for family members. This design can be small and straightforward or large and detailed, depending on how many names you want to include. 13. Heartbeat and Heart Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com A name tattoo with a heartbeat line ending in a heart is a simple yet powerful way to show love. This design looks great on the wrist, chest, or behind the ear. You can also add multiple names to include more than one loved one. 14. Armband Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com An armband tattoo with a name woven into the design gives a bold and stylish look. You can add tribal patterns, floral elements, or geometric shapes to make it unique. This tattoo is an excellent choice for those who want something that stands out. 15. Compass Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com A compass represents guidance and direction. Adding a name to a compass tattoo is a great way to show that someone is your guide or safe place in life. This design is ideal for travelers or people who share a strong bond with someone who constantly points them in the right direction. 16. Star and Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com Stars symbolize hope, dreams, and light. A name tattoo with stars surrounding it adds a magical touch. You can choose a single star or a cluster of small stars to make it unique. Some people prefer to have shooting stars or constellations included in the design. 17. Wave Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com If your loved one profoundly connects with the ocean, a wave tattoo with their name is a perfect tribute. It represents strength, calmness, and the flow of life. This design is excellent for surfers, beach lovers, or anyone who finds peace in the water. 18. Infinity Heart Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com Combining an infinity symbol with a heart and a name is popular for couples or parents. It represents love that lasts forever. You can add small decorative elements like flowers or arrows to personalize the design further. 19. Minimalist Name Tattoo Image: pinterest.com For those who love simplicity, a small, clean font name tattoo can be as meaningful as an elaborate design. It looks great on the wrist, collarbone, or behind the ear. This is an excellent option for people who want a discreet but meaningful tattoo. 20. Matching Name Tattoos Image: pinterest.com Want to share a tattoo with someone special? Matching name tattoos allows you to carry a piece of each other forever. You can choose identical designs or complementary styles. Some popular ideas include a heart with a name inside, initials, or a quote split between two tattoos. Final Thoughts A name tattoo is more than just ink on your skin—it symbolizes love, respect, and deep connection. Make sure it conveys your connection with that individual, regardless of what you choose for a straightforward script or a complex design. Take your time to pick the perfect style, and don’t forget to consult a skilled tattoo artist for the best results. Key Takeaways A name tattoo is a meaningful way to celebrate a loved one. There are various styles, from simple cursive to detailed artistic designs. Placement options range from visible areas like the wrist to discreet spots like behind the ear. Tattoo pain levels depend on the location and your personal tolerance. Frequently Asked Questions 1. Is it painful to get a name tattoo? Yes, tattoos can be painful, but the level of pain depends on the location and your pain tolerance. Areas with more bone, like ribs or ankles, tend to hurt more than fleshy areas, like the upper arm or thigh. 2. What is the best placement for a name tattoo? The best placement depends on your preference and the tattoo size. Typical spots include the wrist, forearm, collarbone, shoulder, and chest. If you want something more discreet, behind the ear or on the ankle are good options. 3. Can I add a name to an existing tattoo? Yes, many tattoo artists can modify existing tattoos to include a name. You can blend it into a design or add decorative elements like hearts, stars, or flowers. 4. How much does a name tattoo cost? The price varies depending on the tattoo size, design complexity, and the artist’s experience. Simple name tattoos may cost anywhere from $50 to $200, while detailed designs can be more expensive. 5. What if I want to remove or cover up a name tattoo? If you ever change your mind, you can get laser tattoo removal or a cover-up tattoo. A skilled artist can turn an old name tattoo into a new design with creative shading and patterns. Was this article helpful? ACCESSORIES What Is Permanent Jewelry? Everything You Need to Know Before Getting One Written by Dr. Usama Hassan Last Updated on March 7, 2025 Image: istock.com Hey, are you sick of wearing and changing everyday fashion wear jewelry but on the other side you are fond of jewelry as well. You might have heard the name of permanent jewelry before and that’s why you are here searching for good information before going through the process. Articles Contains What is Permanent Jewelry? Materials Used Process Duration and Maintenance When and How Permanent Jewelry is Removed? Potential Risks or Downsides Cost and Affordability Conclusion Key Takeaways Frequently Asked Questions References What is Permanent Jewelry? It’s a type of jewelry that is like the typical ones except that it does not have any clasps or locks for fixing or tying it. It is welded around the neck, wrists, and ankles, or it can be in the form of a necklace, bracelet, anklet ring, earrings or nose, or dermal piercings whatever you like. Some people may also choose tooth gems or grills depending upon your taste of jewelry. It symbolizes love, bond, sentimentality, commitment, and connection with someone beloved, partner, or family. [1] Popularity and Trends Image: istock.com If you check hashtags around permanent jewelry on Instagram and other platforms, you will find more than 20,000 hits. So its everywhere lately. Chrissy Teigen is a model and TV personality recognized for her bold fashion choices. She was an early adopter of permanent jewelry, sporting a delicate gold bracelet. This piece symbolizes lasting family bonds and love. Kylie Jenner is leading the trend in permanent jewelry with her sleek anklet, reflecting her glamorous lifestyle and preference for bespoke accessories. Her choice has increased interest in permanent leg jewelry, highlighting her influential style. Justin and Hailey Bieber have taken their commitment to the next level with matching permanent bracelets, symbolizing their love and dedication. This romantic gesture has inspired many couples to consider permanent jewelry as a modern twist on traditional symbols of affection. Bella Hadid has embraced the permanent jewelry trend with a minimalist chain that enhances her edgy style. This choice shows that permanent jewelry is versatile and timeless, fitting seamlessly into any wardrobe. Zoë Kravitz , a style icon, has embraced permanent jewelry with a chic necklace that reflects her effortless, eclectic fashion. Known for blending bohemian and modern elements, this piece showcases her unique style. [4] Materials Used Image: istock.com 14k Gold ; if you want a hypoallergenic, durable, resistant to tarnishing, and lifetime product that won’t irritate your skin, it’s the best choice. 14k Gold-Filled ; it is a more affordable alternative to solid gold having a thick layer of 14k gold bonded to the base metal having similar characteristics. Sterling Silver ; it is also affordable, beautiful and relatively durable. It will just require buffing to keep shine. Titanium ; titanium is a good choice for people with sensitive skin or active lifestyles. However, it can be duller as compared to silver or gold. It is strong and lightweight. Stainless Steel ; a good budget option, affordable and durable. But it can scratch more easily and is not hypoallergenic for everyone. Gold or Silver Plated ; is not a good one, but can be an option for short-term wear as they tarnish and wear quickly. So the choice of material depends not only on aesthetic preference but also on durability, skin sensitivity, and affordability. Each material has its own benefits. [2] Quick Tips Choose a wrist opposite of your watch wearing wrist. Don’t wear too tight bracelets. Don’t wear too loose bracelets that snag on doorknobs or corners. Super delicate chains are likely to snap. People with sensitive skin should choose highest karat gold. Use a Dawn dish soap and a wash cloth or old toothbrush to get into the grooves, then wipe it with an eyeglass cleaning cloth. For silver bracelets, you can even slip on a latex glove and carefully clean with brush-and-rinse silver polish . Excessive contact with hand sanitizer, lotion, hairspray, natural hot spring water, or even certain chlorinated pools and hot tubs can alter your jewelry’s color. Make sure to ask about reattachment policies! Many permanent jewelers have a courtesy repair for the first break or a small fee to reattach thereafter. [3] Process Image: istock.com Acquiring permanent jewelry is a simple and painless process. The welding method utilized is safe and can be done comfortably in the comfort of your home or a public space. Trained professionals, known as Linkers, will provide a protective layer to cover your skin, and optional safety sunglasses are available for added precaution. While you won’t feel the welding itself, you will be able to hear and see it as it occurs. Getting linked involves a straightforward five-step process: Select a Chain: Choose from a variety of 14k solid gold options. Choose a Charm: You may also opt for a simple chain if you prefer. Pick Your Placement: Decide whether you want a bracelet, necklace, anklet, or ring. Custom-Fit It: Collaborate with your trained Linker to ensure the perfect fit. Weld It On: You’re officially linked! [5] Duration and Maintenance Image: istock.com Permanent jewelry can last from one to several years, depending on individual lifestyle and care. Danielle Watt from River Valley Designs mentions her chains have lasted nearly two years due to her less active routine. Christine Coughlin of Flash and Fuse notes that gold-fill metal can last at least two years with proper care, but factors like tanning and swimming can affect longevity. Kim Thompson from Love, Eros emphasizes the importance of metal quality, stating that solid gold pieces often last longer. If a chain breaks, it’s advisable to return to the artist for repairs, which are usually done for free or a small fee. [6] Investing in high-quality permanent jewelry can provide a lifetime of use. However, it is not indestructible. Keep In Mind: Keep your jewelry away from harsh chemicals in cleaners, chlorine, and cosmetics to prevent tarnishing. Regularly polish sterling silver and use silver polish for tarnish. While permanent jewelry can handle daily wear, avoid extended exposure to saltwater or chlorine. Rinse with fresh water afterward to protect it. [13] When and How Permanent Jewelry Is Removed? Image: istock.com Even dedicated jewelry lovers may eventually grow tired of wearing the same piece, especially if it becomes worn. Changing Tastes and Preferences : Over time, our clothing styles may change, leading to a shift in what we consider ideal or attractive. What once seemed perfect may no longer align with our current preferences. Medical Issues or Complications : Temporary removal of jewelry may be necessary due to allergies, discomfort, or to facilitate medical procedures, such as surgery. Professional or Social Considerations : Certain workplaces or social settings may have dress codes that prohibit the wearing of permanent, ornate jewelry. Removal Techniques Removing permanent jewelry is relatively simple. You can use scissors to cut it off at home. However, ensure that you cut it in the correct spot to maintain a seamless appearance for future use. This will also make it easier to reattach the jewelry later with a quick re-welding. [12] Potential Risks Or Downsides Image: istock.com Metal Allergie s: Some individuals may be allergic to metals like nickel in gold-filled jewelry. Please inform the artists of any allergies before getting a permanent piece. Generally, 14k gold is safe for most. [7] Swelling and Tightness : Body size can change due to factors like injury, heat, or pregnancy, affecting jewelry fit. Discuss any concerns with your jewelry artist beforehand. [7] Lifestyle impacts safety,” says Shari Tammietti, Owner of Permanent Jewelry Training . “If you’re a firefighter who can’t wear a wedding ring, permanent jewelry isn’t for you. But if your lifestyle permits, it’s safe. Medical Procedures : What about X-rays, CAT scans, and MRIs? Permanent jewelry can be removed and reattached easily with nail clippers. Since these procedures are rare for most, don’t let the need to remove jewelry stop you from choosing permanent options. [8] Sports and Workplace: Many sports and workplaces prohibit you from wearing jewelry and that also includes permanent jewelry of course. Cost and Affordability Image: istock.com Purchasing permanent jewelry is slightly different from traditional jewelry. Some brands charge more for the jewelry application and the cost of the individual pieces. When people ask how much do permanent bracelets cost, the answer ranges from $35 to $200. [11] At Catbird , prices start at $98 for the Sweet Nothing chain and go up to $348 for the Lover’s Chain. You can also add a diamond for an additional $118 and a star charm for an extra $48. [9] Typically, sterling silver permanent jewelry is the most affordable option, with some pieces starting at below $50. Gold fill and sterling silver bracelets start at $50+ Gold, including rose gold, yellow gold, and white gold, bracelets start at $100+ [10] CONCLUSION We have discussed nearly all aspects of permanent jewelry, including its pros and cons. Now, it’s up to you to decide whether you’re adventurous enough to wear permanent jewelry or if you prefer to wear it for a shorter period. With proper care and maintenance, anyone can manage well with this increasingly popular trend. Celebrities serve as a significant motivation for many, influencing people to at least try it out once. Key Takeaways Permanent jewelry lacks traditional clasps, making it a popular choice for symbolizing deep emotional bonds, like love or commitment. Welded styles can be found in necklaces, bracelets, anklets, and rings. Celebrities like Kylie Jenner and Justin Bieber have helped make this trend desirable. Jewelry made from 14k gold is strong and hypoallergenic. Gold-filled options are budget-friendly Sterling silver tarnishes and needs regular maintenance. Titanium is lightweight and suitable for sensitive skin, and stainless steel is cost-effective but prone to scratches. Gold or silver plated items can wear away quickly and are not ideal for daily use. It’s recommended to wear welded bracelets on the opposite wrist from your dominant hand for comfort. Finding the right size is crucial to avoid discomfort or loss. Regular cleaning helps retain appearance and prevents tarnish. Custom designs can be created with a jewelry designer for a personalized look, achieved by fusing the ends to create a permanent piece. Frequently Asked Questions Will Permanent Jewelry Tarnish? Of course. Like all jewelry, you should clean your bracelet or anklet often. Chemicals you find in pools will tarnish your permanent jewelry. Gold is less likely to tarnish than any other metal. Does Permanent Jewelry Interfere with TSA? No. Our fine TSA officers don't ask you to remove jewelry when going through airport security. Permanent jewelry is jewelry and doesn't have to come off. Is It Comfortable To Sleep In Permanent Jewelry? Welded jewelry is perfectly comfortable to sleep in. It is so lightweight & comfortable, you may not even notice it. How long will permanent jewelry last? Permanent jewelry will last for years with the right amount of care. References 1. About Us The Prettier Everyday Team Editorial Policy Contact Us Home » FASHION » CELEBRITIES From the Soccer Field to the Red Carpet: Kealia Watt’s Best Fashion Moments Written by Dr. Zarnish Tauheed Last Updated on March 3, 2025 Image: chron.com Kealia Watt is no stranger to the spotlight. While she made a name for herself as a fierce competitor on the soccer field, her style off the pitch has been turning heads as well. Kealia always pulls off chic and carefree appearances, whether she’s supporting her husband, J.J. Watt, at a function, attending a high-profile event, or going out for a laid-back day. Over the years, she has developed a fashion sense that blends sporty, chic, and classic elements, making her one of the most fashionable former athletes. Let’s take a closer look at some of her best fashion moments that prove her versatility in the world of style. Articles Contains Red Carpet Royalty: Kealia Watt’s Most Stunning Fashion Moments Final Thoughts Key Takeaways Frequently Asked Questions Red Carpet Royalty: Kealia Watt’s Most Stunning Fashion Moments 1. The Elegant Gala Look Image: footwearnews.com One of Kealia’s most memorable fashion moments was her appearance at the 2023 Sports Illustrated Awards. Dressed in a sleek, light green dress with subtle embellishments, she exuded elegance and sophistication. The dress, which featured a structured silhouette, complemented her athletic frame while highlighting her effortless grace. Paired with minimalist accessories and soft waves in her hair, this look cemented her status as a style icon. The outfit’s simplicity proved that sometimes, less is more when it comes to red-carpet fashion. 2. A Power Suit Done Right Image: theknot.com Kealia Watt knows how to balance femininity with power dressing. At a promotional event for one of her brand partnerships, she stepped out in a tailored white suit that showcased both confidence and sophistication. The suit, designed with a modern, slim fit, gave off a polished and commanding presence. She kept the look sleek by pairing it with a neutral-toned blouse and pointed-toe heels. With minimal jewelry and her hair styled in a sharp ponytail, she demonstrated that women’s power dressing isn’t just about bold colors but confidence and structure. 3. Casual Chic: Everyday Style Goals Image: instagram.com Off the red carpet, Kealia’s style remains just as impressive. She’s frequently spotted in well-put-together casual looks that are both stylish and comfortable. One standout moment was her effortlessly cool ensemble: a relaxed pair of high-waisted jeans, a cropped sweatshirt, and stylish white sneakers. Adding a touch of luxury to the casual look, she accessorized with oversized sunglasses and a designer crossbody bag. The outfit was a testament to how she merges athletic influences with street style, making everyday wear look effortlessly chic. 4. Glamorous in Gold Image: www.msn.com Another striking red carpet moment was Kealia’s appearance at a charity gala, where she stunned in a shimmering gold gown. The metallic fabric and sleek silhouette gave her an ethereal glow under the event’s lighting. Her choice of understated makeup and soft curls let the dress take center stage, proving her ability to balance glamour with simplicity. The look perfectly represented her evolving red carpet style—bold yet refined. 5. Sporty and Stylish at Brand Events Image: traciling.com Given her background as a professional athlete, Kealia has always maintained a connection to sportswear. But even in athletic gear, she knows how to make a statement. At a promotional event for TravisMathew, a brand she represents, she wore a matching monochrome activewear set that blended performance with style. The sleek, high-waisted leggings and crop top combination, paired with a fitted zip-up jacket, showed that functional fashion can still be fashionable. Her ability to style athletic pieces in a modern and elevated way is one reason she has become a favorite in the sportswear fashion industry. 6. Effortless Vacation Chic Image: dailymail.co.uk Kealia knows how to balance elegance and comfort, and this vacation look is the perfect example. She wore a stylish navy blue dress with intricate detailing, effortlessly blending sophistication with a laid-back vibe. The fitted silhouette and knee-length cut made it ideal for a sunset stroll by the water. She completed the look with delicate sandals and a neutral-toned handbag, letting the serene backdrop enhance the outfit’s charm. Walking hand in hand with her husband, the moment captured a blend of romance and relaxed vacation style. 7. Athleisure Done Right Image: chron.com Athleisure has recently become a significant trend, and Kealia Watt has mastered it. Whether she’s running errands or heading to a workout, she knows how to make athletic wear look put together. One of her best athleisure moments came when she stepped out in a light blue sweatshirt, seamless leggings, and sleek sneakers. This look exemplifies how she blends practicality with style, making sporty fashion a core part of her wardrobe. 8. The Effortless Vacation Look Kealia’s maternity style blends elegance with comfort effortlessly. In this heartwarming outdoor moment, she wore a form-fitting brown dress that highlighted her baby bump beautifully. The simple yet sophisticated design, paired with delicate jewelry and soft waves in her hair, made the look timeless. Her bare feet added a relaxed touch, emphasizing natural beauty and confidence. Standing beside her husband in a casual yet stylish gray long-sleeve and dark jeans, the couple radiated warmth and happiness, proving that maternity fashion can be both chic and effortless. 9. The All-Black Statement Look Kealia knows how to command attention on the red carpet, and this black dress proves it. She stunned in a sleek, form-fitting black dress with a plunging neckline and a cinched waist, highlighting her effortless sense of style. Paired with strappy black heels and a chic clutch, the look was both sophisticated and timeless. Her blonde waves and glowing makeup added the perfect finishing touch. Standing beside her husband, who looked sharp in a classic gray suit, the couple exuded elegance and confidence, making this one of her most memorable fashion moments. Final Thoughts Kealia Watt’s fashion evolution has been nothing short of impressive. From her days as a soccer star to her time in the fashion spotlight, she has proven that her style is as versatile as her career. She consistently brings a fresh and polished approach to fashion, whether on the red carpet, at a brand event, or simply out and about. Her ability to transition between casual, sporty, and glamorous looks makes her a true style inspiration. As she continues to expand her presence in the fashion world, we can expect many more unforgettable fashion moments from Kealia Watt in the future. Key Takeaways Kealia Watt combines sporty, casual, and elegant styles, proving she can rock any look. She has delivered stunning looks at significant events, showcasing her ability to pull off classic and bold fashion choices. Even in workout wear, Kealia adds a touch of luxury, making athleisure look polished and stylish. She embraced pregnancy fashion with grace, opting for chic and flattering outfits. With her growing presence in the fashion world, Kealia’s style evolution inspires many. Frequently Asked Questions 1. What is Kealia Watt’s fashion style known for? Kealia Watt’s fashion style is a mix of sporty, chic, and elegant. She seamlessly transitions between casual athleisure, tailored power suits, and glamorous red carpet looks. 2. What are some of Kealia Watt’s iconic red carpet moments? Some of her standout red carpet looks include a sleek black gown at the Sports Illustrated Awards, a shimmering gold dress at a charity gala, and a midnight blue gown at the ESPYs. 3. How does Kealia Watt incorporate sportswear into her everyday fashion? She often wears stylish athleisure outfits, such as monochrome activewear sets, seamless leggings, and cropped hoodies, pairing them with luxury accessories to elevate the look. 4. Did Kealia Watt maintain her fashion-forward style during pregnancy? Yes, Kealia embraced maternity fashion with elegant, form-fitting dresses highlighting her baby bump while maintaining her signature polished and sophisticated style. 5. What brands has Kealia Watt collaborated with for fashion? Kealia is a brand ambassador for TravisMathew’s women’s apparel line, known for blending performance and style in its clothing. FASHION MEN’S FASHION Balance HOROSCOPE ENTERTAINMENT POLITICS TRAVEL HOME About Us The Prettier Everyday Team Editorial Policy Contact Us Home » RELATIONSHIP » FAMILY How to Handle Anger in Family Relationships? Written by Dr. Rani Aimen Last Updated on February 27, 2025 Image: NWA Counsellor Do you feel your blood pressure shooting when your spouse is not listening to you or helping you? Do you fume when you feel like your mother in law is trying to control you in most of the matters? Does the non-cooperative behavior from your child make you irritated? Do you have an inner frustration if your parents are giving more attention to other sibling? Well, it’s natural to feel anger in all these situations. What matters here is that how you manage that anger. In this article, we have shared some practical ways which will help you effectively handle anger in family relationships. Articles Contains Causes of Anger in Family Relationships Strategies for Anger Management in Family Relationships. Long-Term Benefits of Positively Handling Anger in Family Relationships? Final Thoughts Key Takeaways Frequently Asked Questions References Causes of Anger in Family Relationships Before learning the strategies to handle anger in family relationships, let’s first see what are some of the causes of this anger. Within families, anger can be because of several reasons. Some of these are: Expectations not fulfilling Communication gaps Difference of opinion on issues and unresolved conflicts Financial problems Work pressure resulting in not giving productive time to family Power struggles To deal with anger effectively, you must be well-aware about yourself and have emotional intelligence ( 1 ). Those who are good at it are better able to build healthy family relationships and emotional closeness based on their better understanding and ability to resolve conflicts. Whereas poor anger management worsens the condition by creating emotional barriers and long-term resentments. Some people even have regrets and long-term stress from their past outbursts in anger which can badly affect their physical and mental health ( 2 ). Image: Better help How to Handle: Strategies for Anger Management in Family Relationships Let’s delve deeper here and know some of the strategies which will help you positively handle anger in family relationships. 1. Accept It Yes, first of all, acknowledge and embrace your emotion of anger. Otherwise you can have passive-aggressive behavior ( 3 ). Know what triggers your anger, communicate what you feel in a healthy way, and develop strategy for resolving the underlying issue. Image: Pexels 2. Deep Breathing and Relaxation Techniques Help Mostly people don’t know the importance of deep breathing but this is an effective way to handle anger and related stress. Deep breathing exercises with mindfulness make you self aware, calms the nervous system and reduces the intensity of your anger ( 4 ). Other relaxation strategies that can help you calm your nerves, release your tension, and reduce the burden of the challenges that life throws at you can be: Sipping your favorite drink Having some pleasant scents around Enjoying nature Stretching Listening to something soothing Meditating Engaging in humor and laughing at yourself for your unrealistic expectations Exercising or doing enjoyable physical activities. All this can lighten you up and help in reducing your anger. They are natural pick-me-ups and stress diffusers. Image: pexels 3. Work On Your Communication You really need to learn healthy communication for resolving your anger issues within the family. Some tips for improving your communication include: Listen attentively to better understand and promote empathy ( 5 ). Don’t blame others in your conversations rather use ‘I’ statements and address your issue directly and clearly. You can say I feel hurt or upset when my opinion is not heard instead of blaming others by saying they don’t listen to you. Don’t react immediately, if you feel like yelling at someone pause, count till 10, or move away from that place, think before you speak. Try your best to avoid lash outs as they mostly result in regrets. Try to discuss about any conflicting issue when you and the other family member are calm as it will make the conversation more productive. These communication tips let you handle anger better by giving you time for processing your emotions and reacting thoughtfully rather than just impulsively. This helps in preventing the anger from reaching its peak and the associated outbursts with it ( 6 ). Image: pexels 4. Forgive And Forget This is the hardest but it is the most important. Those who have grip on it are the real successful ones and are able to handle anger effectively. If you hold on grudges and think that others will feel what you are going through and repay you, you are just in an imaginary world as this does not work mostly and only affects you and take you in bitterness. Where as forgiveness removes the burden from you. Image: pexels 5. Set Your Boundaries When family members are clear about boundaries of other family members, they are more likely to respect each other’s personal space as they know what is acceptable and what is going to create problem. This helps in reducing frustration, anger and resentments along with promoting respectful interactions ( 7 ). For example some discipline and conflict resolution rules in home by the parents help them in controlling their excessive anger-driven punishments. Similarly those feeling disturbed by someone’s frequent interruption in conversation can say ‘Please let me complete my point before you start speaking’. Image: pexels 6. Initiate Positive Interactions Yes, this helps. Even if you just had an outburst and are feeling regret over it, just wait for a while and then start positive interactions with your family members. This technique works in most cases to counterbalance the negative impacts of anger in your relationships. Joint family activities such as picnic, or game nights are good for fostering healthy bonding among family members and strengthening their relationship. This also makes it easier to go through conflicts if any arises. Image: pexels 7. You Need A Break Everyone needs it otherwise we are going to breakdown. Know yourself better, your energy levels and take small breaks throughout your stressful routine. This will help you to be at your best. Image: pexels 8. Never Hesitate To Take Professional Help If you are facing issue of uncontrolled anger which is disturbing your life and relationships, better is to take professional counsel and learn evidence-based techniques. Cognitive behavioral therapy, group therapy, or family counseling all work great for dealing with anger, healing, and enhancing your satisfaction in family relationships ( 8 ). Specific therapists having training in anger management can also give customized management plan for individuals and families dealing with this issue after identification of the underlying causes ( 9 ). What Are Some Long-Term Benefits Of Positively Handling Anger In Family Relationships? Those who prioritize anger management and are able to effectively manage anger in their family relationships also get several long-term benefits because of it. Some of them are: Strong family bonds Having a sense of emotional safety meaning that you know you hold an importance in the family and you are respected Overall having a supportive, harmonious, and nurturing environment in the home Less conflicts among family Healthier communications Better role models for next generation for emotional regulation skills Image: The important site Final Thoughts Those who prioritize anger management and are able to effectively manage anger in their family relationships also get several long-term benefits because of it. Some of them are: Strong family bonds Having a sense of emotional safety meaning that you know you hold an importance in the family and you are respected Overall having a supportive, harmonious, and nurturing environment in the home Less conflicts among family Healthier communications Better role models for next generation for emotional regulation skills Key Takeaways Now that you are aware that how you can handle anger in family relationships, let’s just go through the points briefly. Know the root cause of your anger so that you can work on it Accept that you are going through angry moments Relax yourself with some relaxation techniques Work on improving your communication Make it your habit to forgive and forget Clearly state your boundaries wherever needed Even after an outburst in anger, initiate positive interactions with your family as its quite human Give yourself breaks during your hectic schedules Consult a therapist if situation is uncontrolled or for better guidance. Frequently Asked Questions 1. When my anger becomes unhealthy? If you are having frequent outbursts, prolonged unresolved conflicts, frustration, and physical aggression, your anger is not healthy. When it is disturbing you or others, and affecting your relationships too, you must look into it. 2. What can I do in case of a heated argument? Count till ten before responding,Try your best to avoid lash out, Move from the place, Do meditation to restore your focus. 3. How to improve communication for managing anger better? Listen and understand better, Don’t blame others rather use ‘I’ statements, Don’t bring in whole past history but just focus on the current issue at hand. 4. How to prevent anger from reaching its peak? Instead of waiting for a major conflict, address the problem early on, Never use harsh language at the moment, Work for solutions to the problem, not just invest your energies in winning the argument. 5. Can trust be rebuilded after an angry outburst? Yes, accept the responsibility for your behavior, ask for forgiveness, start positive talks, and work on preventing such incidents in future. Be consistent with your behavior. References Gross, J. J. (1998). "The emerging field of emotion regulation: An integrative review." of Sugary Drinks and Processed Foods in Weight Gain? Written by Dr. Usama Hassan Last Updated on February 15, 2025 Image: istock.com Are you someone who can’t enjoy watching TV without a large pack of microwaved popcorn? Do you find it hard to study without snacks like chips, fries, and crackers? If you love sweetened coffee and tea, canned meats, hot dogs, and sausages, this might resonate with you. Are you a social butterfly who enjoys alcoholic beverages or frequently consumes energy drinks like Red Bull or soda? If your dessert table is usually filled with cakes, pastries, and white bread, then you’re reading the right thing to learn more about your habits and behavioural effects on health. Articles Contains What are Sugary Drinks? What are Processed Foods? Role of Sugary Drinks and Processed Foods in Weight Gain? Conclusion Key Takeaways References What Are Sugary Drinks? Image: istock.com Sugary drinks, also known as sugar-sweetened beverages or “soft” drinks, include any beverage that contains added sugar or sweeteners such as high fructose corn syrup, sucrose, and fruit juice concentrates. This category encompasses soda, pop, cola, tonic water, fruit punch, lemonade (and other similar beverages), sweetened powdered drinks, as well as sports and energy drinks. To give you a clearer idea of how much sugar is in these drinks, consider that there are 4.2 grams of sugar in a single teaspoon. Now, imagine scooping 7 to 10 teaspoons of sugar and putting it into a 12-ounce glass of water. That might sound overly sweet, but surprisingly, that’s how much added sugar is typically found in a can of soda. This visualization can help you understand just how much sugar is in your drink. [1] Keep In Mind: When ranking beverages based on their health benefits, sugary drinks rank at the bottom of the list. These drinks contain a high number of calories but offer little to no nutritional value. Research shows that people who consume sugary beverages do not feel as satisfied as they would after consuming the same amount of calories from solid food. Additionally, these individuals tend not to reduce their food intake to compensate for the extra calories they consume in drinks. [2] What Are Processed Foods? Image: istock.com Processed food refers to any food or drink modified during its preparation. Foods are typically processed for several reasons, including: Ensuring safety (e.g., pasteurizing milk) Preparing for use (e.g., extracting oil from seeds) Preserving the food (e.g., tinned or frozen foods) Enhancing flavor (e.g., adding salt or sweeteners) Creating convenient ready meals and snacks. Not all processed foods are unhealthy, but many ultra-processed foods are high in calories, saturated fat, salt, or sugar. Consuming excessive calories, saturated fat, salt, and sugar while not eating enough fruits, vegetables, and fiber is detrimental to health. [3] Role of Sugary Drinks and Processed Foods in Weight Gain Sugary Drinks and Caloric Compensation: Image: istock.com Consuming more ounces of sugary beverages each day leads to a higher calorie intake later in the day. This contrasts with the pattern observed with solid foods, where people often compensate for a large meal by eating fewer calories in subsequent meals. This compensatory response does not appear to occur after drinking soft drinks, and several reasons may explain this. Firstly, liquids do not provide the same sense of fullness or satisfaction as solid foods because the body does not register liquid calories in the same way. As a result, individuals may continue to eat even after consuming a high-calorie beverage. Additionally, sweet-tasting soft drinks—whether they are sweetened with sugar or a calorie-free substitute—may increase cravings for other sweet, high-carbohydrate foods. Interestingly, although soda may contain more sugar than a cookie, people’s perceptions play a role: they tend to view soda as just a drink and cookies as a dessert. Consequently, they are more likely to limit their food intake than their beverage consumption. [1] Quick Tip: Drinking water in place of sugary drinks or fruit juices is associated with lower long-term weight gain. [1] Sugary Drinks and Health Risks: Image: istock.com The average can of sugar-sweetened soda or fruit punch provides almost 150 calories from added sugar. If you drink just one of these sugary drinks daily and cut back on calories elsewhere, you could gain up to 5 pounds in a year. Beyond weight gain, routinely drinking these sugar-loaded beverages can increase the risk of type 2 diabetes, heart disease, and other chronic diseases. Furthermore, higher consumption of sugary drinks has been linked with an increased risk of premature death. [1] Ultra-processed Foods and Increased Caloric Intake: Image: istock.com The research team studied 20 volunteers (10 male, 10 female) at the NIH Clinical Center over 28 days. Half consumed ultra-processed foods for the first 2 weeks, while the other half ate unprocessed foods. After this, they switched diets. Participants had three meals daily and could eat as much or little as they wanted, with access to snacks and water. Researchers hypothesized that ultra-processed foods might increase calorie intake due to their high sugar, fat, and salt content while being low in fiber. Ultimately, when on the ultra-processed diet, participants consumed an average of 508 more calories per day than on the unprocessed diet, leading to an average weight gain of 2 pounds (0.9 kg), primarily as body fat. Participants in the unprocessed food group lost an average of 0.9 kg during the 2-week study period. This group also saw increases in the gut hormone peptide YY, which suppresses hunger and decreases the hunger hormone ghrelin. [4] The Impact of Specific Food Choices on Long Term Weight Gain: Image: istock.com A research team at the Harvard School of Public Health, led by Dr. Dariush Mozaffarian and Dr. Frank Hu, studied lifestyle changes contributing to long-term weight gain with funding from the NIH and its institutes. They analyzed the habits of over 120,000 health professionals over 12 to 20 years, using biennial surveys and measuring weight every four years. Their findings were published in the New England Journal of Medicine on June 23, 2011. The study found that specific food choices, such as potato chips, sugar-sweetened beverages, and processed meats, were linked to weight gain. At the same time, a higher intake of vegetables, whole grains, fruits, nuts, and yogurt was associated with weight loss. Dr. Hu emphasized that the idea of “good” and “bad” foods is a myth, suggesting that highly processed foods may not satisfy hunger like less processed, higher-fiber foods do, leading to increased calorie consumption. [5] CONCLUSION After reviewing research-based facts and evidence, it’s up to you to decide whether to maintain your current eating habits or switch to a healthier diet before it’s too late. Enjoying leisure time with friends or family and occasionally indulging in different foods is not inherently bad. However, regularly consuming unhealthy foods can ultimately harm your physical well-being. Before considering taxing unhealthy diets, everyone must recognize that eating habits can negatively impact their bodies. The lasting change comes from internal motivation. Key Takeaways Be aware of what you are consuming. Is this part of a diet, or is it a harmful substance Sugary beverages have a high number of calories but little or no nutritional value Drinking water in place of sugary drinks or fruit juices is associated with lower long-term weight gain A lot of researches have proved that ultra-processed food cause weight gain Diets like vegetables, whole grains, fruits, nuts, and yogurt are associated with weight loss References 1. Sugary Drinks https://nutritionsource.hsph.harvard.edu/healthy-drinks/sugary-drinks/ 2. Healthy Drinks https://nutritionsource.hsph.harvard.edu/healthy-drinks/ 3.
